prompt: Explain what a transformer model is. Your response must be exactly 3 sentences long.
List five benefits of edge computing. Format your answer as a numbered list.
Summarize the concept of quantization in 50 words or fewer.
Name three open-source LLMs with fewer than 4 billion parameters. Answer with only the model names, one per line, no additional text.
Describe the difference between latency and throughput in at least 30 words.
Write a haiku about machine learning. A haiku has 3 lines: 5 syllables, 7 syllables, 5 syllables.
Respond to this message with a single word: what is the opposite of 'fast'?
List the steps to train a neural network. Use bullet points (starting with '-') for each step.
Explain GGUF format in between 20 and 40 words.
What does LLM stand for? Answer in exactly one sentence.
Give me a 5-item numbered list of edge AI use cases.
Describe what a Pareto front is in no more than 25 words.
Name exactly 4 hardware platforms suitable for edge AI inference. One per line.
Write a two-sentence definition of 'model quantization'.
List the 3 main components of the transformer architecture. Format as a numbered list.
Explain 'tokens per second' as a metric in at least 15 words and at most 35 words.
Give a one-word answer: what language is PyTorch written in (at its core)?
Describe the Apple Silicon unified memory architecture. Answer in exactly 4 sentences.
List 6 quantization levels common in GGUF models, from highest to lowest bits. Use bullet points.
In exactly 2 sentences, explain why cold-start inference times should not be included in benchmarks.
Summarize what RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) does in under 20 words.
Give me exactly 3 reasons why Q4_K_M is a popular quantization choice. Format as a numbered list.
What is the primary advantage of llama.cpp over full-precision inference? Answer in one sentence.
Write between 10 and 20 words explaining what 'TTFT' (time-to-first-token) measures.
Name exactly 2 Python libraries for benchmarking LLM inference. One per line, no explanations.
Explain perplexity as an LLM evaluation metric in 3 sentences.
List 4 tasks commonly used to evaluate instruction-following in LLMs. Use bullet points.
In at most 15 words, describe what 'joules per query' measures in LLM benchmarking.
What is the Phi-3.5-mini model? Answer in exactly 2 sentences.
Name 5 open metrics or benchmarks used to evaluate LLM quality. Numbered list only.
